tweet.text: We are preparing a 25% tariff on imported semiconductors and advanced chips starting next month.

candidate.filter_reason: Direct trade-policy signal with a clear semiconductor supply-chain transmission channel.

expected.rationale_focus: Tariffs can raise input costs, disrupt supply chains, and pressure risk sentiment.

tweet.text: Officials signaled policy rates may need to stay restrictive for longer if inflation progress stalls.

candidate.filter_reason: Clear macro policy signal that can move rates, FX, and equity sentiment.

expected.rationale_focus: Higher-for-longer expectations can pressure duration and broad risk assets.

tweet.text: Negotiators say a ceasefire framework could reopen Red Sea shipping lanes within days.

candidate.filter_reason: Geopolitical de-escalation with plausible oil and shipping-cost transmission.

expected.rationale_focus: Lower shipping disruption risk can ease energy and logistics stress and support risk sentiment.

tweet.text: Draft legislation would require stablecoin issuers to hold short-dated Treasury reserves and submit to federal supervision.

candidate.filter_reason: Direct regulatory signal for crypto markets with spillover to rates and dollar demand.

expected.rationale_focus: Regulation may support institutional adoption while tightening constraints on some crypto participants.
